title: Hyper Payment
tagline: A developer-first payment gateway for digital goods
overview: Hyper Payment is a lightweight, fast payment gateway designed specifically for digital businesses — gaming credits, SaaS subscriptions, and virtual goods. It provides a clean REST API and a real-time dashboard.
problem: Generic payment gateways like Stripe are complex to configure for digital goods, especially for gaming and in-app purchases. Developers need something simpler, faster, and purpose-built.
solution: We built a purpose-specific payment layer with minimal setup, webhook support, an admin dashboard, and fraud detection baked in. Integration takes under 30 minutes.
